_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Mitigate/correct security deficiencies identified during security/certification testing and/or recommend risk acceptance for the appropriate senior leader or authorized representative.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifying processing activities that present high risk to individuals, and recommending proportionate technical and organizational measures to mitigate identified risks.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.470), DQ-S-009 (DQ, cosine: 0.452).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.459). Shared vocabulary: [identified, mitigate, risk]. DCWF-only terms [acceptance, appropriate, authorized, certification, correct, deficiencies] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, assessments, conducting, data, high, identifying] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.848, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 29-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (90.8%). "Mitigate/correct security deficiencies identified during security/certification" and "Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifyin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.506 ≈ STS 0.459 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [identified, mitigate, risk] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [identified, mitigate, risk]. DCWF-only: [acceptance, appropriate, authorized, certification, correct, deficiencies]. WIDAI-only: [activities, assessments, conducting, data, high, identifying].
